name: Vulnerable and Outdated Components (Version Disclosure)
description: Detects version disclosure of known vulnerable software components in HTTP response headers and body. Identifies outdated versions of Apache, Nginx, PHP, jQuery, WordPress, Drupal, and other commonly exploited software.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Remove version information from HTTP headers (ServerTokens Prod for Apache, server_tokens off for Nginx). Keep all software components updated to latest stable versions. Implement automated dependency scanning in CI/CD pipelines. Subscribe to security advisories for all deployed components.

intelligence.dfirRelevance: Version disclosure enables targeted exploitation. Attackers cross-reference disclosed versions with CVE databases to find known exploits. Log4Shell, Heartbleed, and EternalBlue all targeted specific software versions.
